name: Fallen of the Tistina
name_jp: ティスティナの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>落</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>お</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>とし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>仔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; place 1 "Divine Domain Baatistina" from your Deck, face-up in your Field Zone. If a face-up "Tistina" Spell/Trap(s) you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 LIGHT "Tistina" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY. You can only use each effect of "Fallen of the Tistina" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; place 1 "Divine Domain Baatistina" from your Deck, face-up in your Field Zone. If a face-up "Tistina" Spell/Trap(s) you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 LIGHT "Tistina" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY. You can only use each effect of "Fallen of the Tistina" once per turn.
eff: You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; place 1 "Divine Domain Baatistina" from your Deck, face-up in your Field Zone. You can only use each effect of "Fallen of the Tistina" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
Activates if destroyed by card effect
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
